## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Ericksson to his new role at growthx.ai, covering key operational and financial aspects.](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Urgent need to clean up and organize financial systems, particularly QuickBooks for the C-Corp](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Transition all business expenses/cards from LLC to C-Corp ASAP](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Focus on preparing financial statements for mid-April board meeting](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Implement improved onboarding processes and clarify organizational structure](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)

## Topics

### Financial Systems Cleanup

  - [QuickBooks for C-Corp needs immediate attention; safe to assume all current activity is strictly business-related](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [LLC QuickBooks contains personal expenses; focus on separating and transitioning business activities to C-Corp](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [Aim to prepare financial statements for mid-April board meeting](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Current burn forecast is based on estimates; need accurate expense data](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)

### Credit Cards and Expenses

  - [Multiple cards in use: Ramp, Amex, Chase](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=1019.0)
  - [Plan to switch all expenses to C-Corp accounts/cards](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Limited software subscriptions, mostly month-to-month charges](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
  - [Need to catalog all recurring expenses and liabilities](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)

### Organizational Structure

  - [New org chart created, dividing into operations and customer-facing teams](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=1611.0)
  - [Customer-facing org structured in 3 layers: heads of departments, pod leads, and account managers/behind-the-scenes staff](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
  - [Plan for variable comp (≈20%) for department heads, incentivized on NRR](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=1672.0)
  - [Currently understaffed at lower levels; focus on hiring](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)

### Onboarding and HR

  - [No formal People Ops; Bridget handling most HR functions](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
  - [Need to streamline onboarding process, potentially automating with help from Yusef](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)
  - [Inconsistencies in offer letters and contracts need addressing](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
  - [New recruiter (Maria) started today to help with hiring](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)

### Tech Stack

  - [Using Addy CRM instead of Salesforce; described as a hybrid between Zapier and Salesforce](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [Need to familiarize with Addy and potentially add missing fields](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [Fathom used for call recording, but raises confidentiality concerns](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Clean up C-Corp QuickBooks, focusing on accurate expense categorization](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Transition all business expenses/cards from LLC to C-Corp](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Meet with Alice to take over invoicing and understand current processes](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Familiarize with Addy CRM and identify any missing fields/processes](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [Review and organize credit card expenses across all accounts](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=1019.0)
  - [Collaborate with Bridget on creating a comprehensive financial model](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
  - [Assist in streamlining onboarding processes and contract management](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting with Bridget to discuss progress and next priorities](https://fathom.video/share/h9y9HjioGxX5gVD1MNnx7D5ng2M5ftrK?tab=summary&timestamp=1862.0)
